TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
12 
SOURCE: 
CMS (HPMS files) 
VALUES: 
— 
COMMENT: 
Plans that use a co-payment amount rather than a coinsurance percentage will not have a value in this 
field; reference instead the corresponding co-payment variable called (PRE_ICL_INPP_COPAY_1M). 
Starting in 2016, CMS changed how they describe pharmacy networks. The INPP
